{{Fig|'''[[Toolkit menu|Toolkit]] : [[Options]] : [[SuperMemo tab in Options|SuperMemo]]''' tab in SuperMemo (theme "Tablet Dark"). '''Grade icons''' checked will ensure grade buttons display icons instead of grade names. All [[Glossary:Element|element]]s will display the picture of "Tanya" (previously imported to the image [[registry]]) as background. Repetition failure will play the "Boo!" sound available in the sound registry.}}
